## Identity

Name: Sairam Ugge
Role: GenAI & Backend Engineer
Company: Ascendion (Jun 2024 – Present)
Location: Hyderabad, India (open to remote)
Email: uggesairam0000@gmail.com

## Role & Availability

Actively seeking Backend, GenAI, and Full-Stack engineering roles.
Open to remote or Hyderabad-based positions.

Schedule a call: https://calendly.com/sairamugge/30min
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/sairam0424
GitHub: https://github.com/sairam0424

## Production Work (honest "co-built" register)

- Pensieve: Multi-agent LLM orchestration engine with HITL approval gates.
  2K+ daily users. Stack: Python, Redis Streams, SSE, multi-cloud LLM routing.

- AAVA Code: AI coding plugin for VS Code. Re-architected single-agent → multi-agent
  (crewAI flows). 3K+ daily users, 5+ client environments, 150+ skills.

- Execution Engine: Prompt-driven artifact generation via RAG + ReAct pipelines.
  Compressed workflow planning from 1.5h to 15 min. 65% → 85% first-pass acceptance.

- Wireframe Generator: GenAI wireframe generator in Experience Studio (SSE, Angular).
  40% fewer UX iteration cycles. 500+ daily users.

- Prompt-to-React: Wireframe → production React component generation.
  50% less frontend dev time. 2K+ developers, 50+ teams.

## Open Source Projects

- MindForge: Agentic framework for Claude Code (1193+ commits)
- Agent-Forge: Self-improving AI agent infrastructure
- ContextOS: SQLite/vector AI agent intelligence layer
- Graph-Forge: Code intelligence platform (~19 microservices, Go + Python + Next.js)
- Ag-Bash: AI-native bash interpreter in TypeScript
- CommandVault: Universal AI command manager
- Not-Humans-Lab: Multi-project AI infrastructure federation
- gRPC-Microservices: Distributed systems reference implementation

## Skills

Languages: Python, Go, TypeScript, JavaScript
GenAI: LLM orchestration, multi-agent systems, RAG, ReAct, crewAI, AWS Bedrock
Backend: FastAPI, gRPC, event-driven architecture, Redis, PostgreSQL, pgvector
Frontend: React, Next.js, Angular
Cloud: AWS (Bedrock, Polly, Transcribe, DynamoDB), Vercel, Docker
